title: Receiving 403 from Monday Code

mapps code:status is also returning: (though intermittently)

posts.author: ashtont (Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently started receiving 403 Forbidden when hitting my monday-code hosted applications.

I am unable to add an integration or check the status (get “/”)

mapps code:status is also returning: (though intermittently)
ERROR: An unknown error happened while fetching deployment status for app version id

I’ve created new app versions, new apps, and even a new developer account and always get the 403’s as of an hour ago or so

Is there perhaps a known issue going on?

For context, I’ve been developing and testing jut fine for the last several days. The behavior seems unexpected and a bit opaque. Any help is greatly appreciated as I’m trying to record a demo for my company (due today, of course)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ashtont and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible (such as app ID, version ID, account ID, full error message, what you see in the logs, etc.).

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: ashtont (Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, @Matias.Monday! I’ve submitted a request. However, I cannot see anything after submission. Is there somewhere I can go to see my submitted tickets and add comments?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ashtont,

I see you are already speaking with my colleague Joseph

posts.author: ashtont (Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! It would be great if we got an email as soon as we submitted the form so we could reply back with more context. Right now, it appears we need to wait for a response before we have something we can respond back to

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

Matias here!

I will pass this feedback to the team in charge of the form

Cheers,
Matias
